Bus Timings

F49 Bus Timings Danube Metro Landside to Cleenol Middle East and Back

January 24, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F49 offers a vital connection within Jebel Ali, linking major commercial and residential areas with key transport hubs. Operating between Danube Metro Landside and Cleenol Middle East, the route serves a diverse range of stops, catering to both daily commuters and visitors.

Route Name F49
Route Description Danube Metro Landside - Cleenol Middle East  - Danube Metro Landside
Total Distance Approximately 20-23 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 20 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 AM - 11:00 PM (Daily)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F49

Bus F49 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F49 runs with a frequent schedule throughout the day to accommodate various travel needs. Here are the departure times:

Bus F49 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for F49 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F49 is consistent with Dubai’s standard public transportation rates, and passengers can conveniently use a Nol card for payment. The standard fare is AED 3 when using the Nol card, while discounted fares are available for students, senior citizens, and people of determination through the Nol card system.

Bus Booking

For convenience, the Nol card can be used to pay for Bus F49 rides. Overall, Bus F49 provides a crucial link in Jebel Ali’s public transport network, making it an essential option for both daily commuting and occasional travel.

Bus Route

The F49 route includes a comprehensive list of stops that cover both industrial and residential areas. Starting at Danube Metro Landside, the bus travels through:

  1. Danube Metro Landside

2.

  1. Landmark Group

  2. Al Khaleej Al Madina Supermarket

  3. Nuzul labour Accommodation

  4. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket

  5. Jebel Ali Industrial Area, Qaser Al Kabayel Center

  6. Jebel Ali Industrial Area 11

9.

  1. Dubai Driving Center

  2. Star Super Cement

  3. Specialist Services

  4. Wade Adams Redimix

  5. National Polyestrene

  6. Etisalat Tower

  7. Cleenol Middle East

  8. ISOFOAM

  9. Unimix

  1. Scientechnic LLC

  2. Four Season Staff Housing

21.

  1. Landmark Group

  2. Al Khaleej Al Madina Supermarket

  3. Nuzul labour Accommodation

  4. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket

  5. Jebel Ali Industrial Area, Qaser Al Kabayel Center

  6. Jebel Ali Industrial Area 11

  7. Nuzul labour Accommodation

  8. Al Khaleej Al Madina Supermarket

  9. BHC Industries

  10. Danube Metro Landside

The bus then loops back to Danube Metro Landside, covering all the stops on its route in both directions.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out are the F50 bus route, which runs from Dubai Investment Park (DIP) Metro to Al Salam Masjid and return, as well as the F23, which goes from Mall Of The Emirates to The Sustainable City, Main Entrance and back.

Bus F49 Station Overview

Danube Metro Landside

Danube Metro Landside is a key station on Dubai’s Red Line, offering seamless connections for commuters. Serving as a crucial transfer point for Bus Routes F47 and F49, this station provides easy access to nearby commercial and residential areas. Its proximity to the Danube outlet also makes it a popular choice for shoppers and those working in the area.

Cleenol Middle East

Cleenol Middle East bus stop is strategically located near the industrial and commercial hub, catering primarily to employees and visitors of nearby businesses. This stop on the Bus F49 route provides essential connectivity to surrounding areas and offers a straightforward commute for those working in the industrial zone. Although it is a more functional stop, its proximity to key workplaces ensures that it remains a critical point on the F49 route, facilitating daily travel for many professionals.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

While the Bus F49 route primarily serves commercial and industrial areas, there are a few notable spots and attractions you might find interesting along the way:

  1. Jebel Ali Beach: Although not directly on the route, Jebel Ali Beach is a well-known destination near Jebel Ali and offers a scenic spot for relaxation by the sea.

  2. Jebel Ali Marina: Located near Jebel Ali, this area provides a picturesque waterfront and is a great place to enjoy dining and leisure activities.

3.

4.

5.

Most of the bus route’s stops are in more industrial and commercial zones, so while you might not find many traditional tourist attractions along the route, there are several notable places you can explore nearby.

Journey Experience

A trip on the F49 bus route from Danube Metro Landside to Cleenol Middle East offers a comprehensive journey through the industrial and business districts of Dubai.

As the bus passes through key stops, travelers can catch glimpses of vibrant commercial activities, showcasing Dubai’s rapid development and thriving economic sectors. The route offers a practical and efficient way to explore this industrial part of the city while connecting key business locations.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can travel to Cleenol Middle East, the furthest point on the F49 bus route starting from Danube Metro Landside, with a fare ranging from AED 40 to AED 48. This price range ensures a convenient and cost-effective journey across the entire route, allowing you to easily reach this key destination. With Careem, you can enjoy a comfortable ride and avoid the hassle of navigating public transport connections.

In conclusion, Bus F49 is a key service in Jebel Ali, offering frequent and reliable connections to major commercial and residential areas. With a well-timed schedule and affordable fares, it caters to both daily commuters and occasional travelers. While online booking is not available, the Nol card system facilitates easy fare payment. Overall, Bus F49 significantly enhances mobility and connectivity in Jebel Ali.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 24, 2026.
